# Undefined-method pass-through under --output-jsonv2 binds a *jsontext.Decoder
# and constructs it with jsontext.NewDecoder(body) instead of decoding.
# Generation-only (no go test / muxt check): building the output needs a
# GOEXPERIMENT=jsonv2 toolchain. The assertions confirm jsontext.NewDecoder is
# emitted and the go-json-experiment backport is never referenced.
muxt generate --output-jsonv2

grep 'jsontext.NewDecoder' template_routes.go
! grep 'go-json-experiment' template_routes.go

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "POST /raw Lookup(unmarshalJSON(body))" -}}{{- printf "%s" .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.25
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))
